title: Festive Multicolor 'New Xmas Design' Xmas Eve Box Mini - 17 x 26.5 x 8.5cm (1 Pc.) - Unique & Vibrant Design - Ideal for Gifts & Home Decor
features: FESTIVE DESIGN: Brighten up your holiday season with our festive multicolor 'new xmas design' xmas eve box mini, featuring a unique and vibrant design sure to spread holiday cheer in any home setting.

DURABLE QUALITY: Expertly crafted from high-quality materials, our xmas eve box is designed to last many holiday seasons, making it the ideal choice to store your family's treasured gifts and keepsakes.

EASY-TO-USE: Effortlessly set up and store this compact 17 x 26.5 x 8.5cm xmas eve box mini, perfect for fitting conveniently in your living space without taking up too much room, while still providing ample space for your gifts.

IDEAL FOR GIFTS & HOME DECOR: Our festive multicolor xmas eve box mini is not only perfect for storing your holiday gifts but also acts as a captivating piece of home decor, adding a touch of festive elegance to any room.

QUALITY MEETS ELEGANCE: With our festive multicolor 'new xmas design' xmas eve box mini, experience the harmonious blend of exceptional quality and stunning design, elevating your seasonal decorations this upcoming holiday.
description: This Christmas design box is perfect for keeping the magic alive this Christmas. These Christmas Eve boxes are meant to fill with joyous surprises in the new tradition!
